# D&D 5e SRD API Documentation

> REST + GraphQL API for the 5e SRD database. Includes guides, tutorials, API reference, and schema documentation.

This file contains links to documentation sections following the llmstxt.org standard.

## Table of Contents

- [FAQ](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/faq.md): Please check if the data is within [the SRD.](https://media.wizards.com/2016/downloads/DND/SRD-OGL_V5.1.pdf) If it is, feel free to open an issue o...
- [Introduction](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/introduction.md): Welcome to the D&D 5e SRD API, the Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition API.
- [Multilingual Support](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/reference/multilingual.md): The D&D 5e SRD API supports multilingual responses, allowing you to request translated content in supported languages. English is always the defaul...
- [Schemas](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/reference/schemas.md): Definitions of all schemas will be accessible in a future update. Two of the most common schemas are described here.
- [Interactive Monster Search with JavaScript](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/tutorials/advanced/monster-search-with-javascript.md): Welcome to this step-by-step tutorial on building an interactive monster search using JavaScript! If you have moderate experience with JavaScript, ...
- [Creating a Spell Card Library with React](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/tutorials/advanced/react-spell-cards.md): This tutorial assumes you have basic knowledge of CSS, React and JavaScript. Specifically,
- [Command Line Spellbook with Python](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/tutorials/advanced/terminal-spellbook-with-python.md): <LearningObjectives objectives={[
- [Discover D&D Races with Shell Scripting](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/tutorials/basic/discover-dnd-races-with-shell-scripting.md): <LearningObjectives objectives={[
- [Getting Started](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/tutorials/beginner/getting-started.md): Let's make our first API request to the D&D 5th Edition API!
- [GraphQL Fundamentals](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/tutorials/beginner/graphql.md): GraphQL is a powerful and flexible way to fetch data from the D&D 5e SRD API. In this tutorial, we will learn how to build and try out a range of G...
- [Tutorials](https://5e-bits.github.io/docs/docs/tutorials/index.md): Welcome to the tutorials section of the documentation. Here you will find a collection of tutorials that will help you get started with the API.
